title: Mexican Gnocchi Casserole
description: A Mexican-inspired casserole made with gnocchi, potatoes, and charred vegetables. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook gnocchi according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add diced potatoes and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add charred bell peppers and onions to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in italian seasoning and cumin. Cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine cooked gnocchi, potato mixture, and shredded cheese. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spoon salsa over the top of the gnocchi mixture.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
